name: Jack Herer
description: Named after the legendary cannabis activist, Jack Herer is the gold standard sativa. Earthy and pine-forward with a spicy finish. Delivers blissful, clear-headed creativity and lasting energy — a true daytime classic.

name: Durban Poison
description: A pure landrace sativa from South Africa. Sweet, earthy, and distinctly spicy with hints of anise. One of the cleanest, most energizing highs available — no ceiling, no anxiety. Built for productivity.

name: Blue Dream
description: California's most beloved hybrid. Sweet blueberry aroma with a full-body relaxation that doesn't sedate. A perfectly balanced experience — calm, creative, and sociable. The perfect introduction to cannabis and a perennial favorite.

name: Girl Scout Cookies
description: GSC is a landmark strain that changed the industry. Sweet, earthy, and slightly minty with a powerful euphoric punch. Potent, long-lasting, and unmistakably complex — one of the most awarded strains ever cultivated.

name: Gelato
description: Gelato is dessert in strain form. Creamy, sweet, and slightly citrusy — it smells exactly like it sounds. Delivers a balanced euphoria that's heavy on the good vibes without knocking you out. Extremely popular for good reason.

name: Skywalker
description: Skywalker is a heavy-hitting indica with a sweet, slightly spicy aroma and fruity undertones. Deep body relaxation, calming euphoria, and a natural transition into sleep. The force is strong with this one.

name: Skywalker OG
description: Skywalker meets OG Kush in one of the most potent indica-dominant hybrids around. Diesel and earthy pine on the nose, massive body high, and a euphoria that eventually gives way to deep sedation. Not for beginners.

name: OG Kush
description: The strain that defined California cannabis. Fuel and citrus on the nose, deep earthy pine on the exhale. OG Kush delivers a heavy euphoria and full-body relaxation with unmistakable complexity. Everything descended from it owes its character here.

name: Granddaddy Purple
description: GDP is one of the most iconic indicas in existence. Deep purple buds, grape candy aroma, and a heavy full-body sedation that makes it the gold standard for sleep and pain relief. Sweet, beautiful, and deeply relaxing.

name: Northern Lights
description: One of the most legendary indicas ever bred. Northern Lights is resinous, earthy, and sweet with a deeply sedating body high. A benchmark for pure indica effects — the kind of relaxation that starts in your head and melts through your whole body.

name: Bubba Kush
description: Bubba Kush is the definition of a heavy indica. Sweet earthy notes with hints of coffee and chocolate. The kind of stone that pins you to the couch in the best possible way — ideal for evenings, stress relief, and winding down after a long day.

name: Purple Kush
description: A pure indica from the Hindu Kush mountain range. Sweet grape and berry flavors with a deep earthy base. Long-lasting body sedation with a dreamy, peaceful euphoria. A staple for anyone who wants a true indica experience.

name: Hindu Kush
description: A pure landrace indica from the mountain range between Afghanistan and Pakistan. Earthy, woody, and classic. Hindu Kush produces a heavy, peaceful sedation that's been cherished for centuries. The grandfather of modern indicas.

name: Sour Diesel
description: Sour Diesel is one of the most recognizable strains in the world. Pungent diesel fuel aroma with a sharp citrus edge. Fast-acting, cerebral, and energizing — the choice for creative work, daytime use, and anyone who needs to be on their A game.

name: Super Lemon Haze
description: Super Lemon Haze hits you with bright lemon zest the moment you open the jar. A multi-award winning sativa that delivers sharp, uplifting energy and creative clarity. Citrusy, sweet, and powerfully motivating — sunshine in a strain.

name: Green Crack
description: Don't let the name scare you — Green Crack is one of the most purely energizing sativas around. Tangy citrus and mango flavor with a sharp mental buzz that keeps you locked in. Perfect for a productive day when you need serious focus.

name: Tangie
description: Tangie smells and tastes exactly like a fresh-peeled tangerine — it's remarkable. Uplifting, happy, and creatively inspired. One of the most flavorful sativas available, with an aroma so true to fruit it almost seems impossible.

name: Wedding Cake
description: Wedding Cake (also known as Pink Cookies) is rich, tangy, and loaded with sweet vanilla and earthy undertones. High-THC, deeply euphoric, and powerfully relaxing. A celebration-worthy strain with serious potency and exceptional flavor.

name: Runtz
description: Runtz is the candy strain. Sweet, fruity, and creamy like actual candy — the aroma is addictive before you even light up. Delivers a long-lasting euphoria and full-body relaxation. One of the most hyped strains of the last decade, and it lives up to it.

name: Gorilla Glue #4
description: GG4 is one of the most potent hybrids ever cultivated. Extremely resinous, pungent and earthy — it earned its name. The high is heavy, euphoric, and full-body. A couch-locker that starts with mental euphoria and gradually pins you in place.

name: Pineapple Express
description: Yes, it's real and yes it's excellent. Pineapple Express smells like fresh tropical fruit and delivers a long-lasting, energetic buzz with waves of euphoria. Creative, social, and genuinely fun — a perfect daytime hybrid.

name: White Widow
description: White Widow is a legend. One of the most famous hybrids ever created, bred in the Netherlands in the 1990s. Earthy and slightly sweet with a burst of pure euphoria and creative energy that doesn't quit. A true classic.

name: AK-47
description: Don't be misled by the name — AK-47 is a mellow, multi-award winning hybrid. Earthy, sweet, and complex. Delivers steady, creative relaxation without sedation. A go-to for social situations, creative work, and anyone who wants clear-headed calm.

name: Chemdawg
description: The strain that launched a thousand others. Chemdawg is the parent of OG Kush and Sour Diesel, and you can taste both in its lineage. Pungent diesel and chemical aroma with a cerebral, creative euphoria and strong body relaxation.

name: Zkittlez
description: Zkittlez tastes exactly like the candy — sweet, fruity, and bursting with tropical and berry notes. It delivers a calming, happy body high without heavy sedation. Perfect for unwinding while staying present and social.

name: Do-Si-Dos
description: Do-Si-Dos is a potent indica-dominant hybrid with a complex sweet and earthy flavor profile accented by floral, lime notes. Deeply relaxing with a strong euphoric onset that transitions into heavy body sedation. High-THC and not for the faint-hearted.

name: Purple Punch
description: Purple Punch smells like grape candy and blueberry muffins. Delivers a one-two punch of relaxation — first a euphoric head high, then a sedating body stone. Beautiful purple buds, incredible flavor, and a nighttime experience unlike anything else.

name: Ice Cream Cake
description: Ice Cream Cake is dessert-tier cannabis. Creamy vanilla and sweet earthy notes with a hint of nuttiness. Deeply relaxing, mildly sedating, and loaded with euphoria. The kind of strain you save for the end of a long day.

name: Master Kush
description: Master Kush is a timeless classic from Amsterdam with deep Hindu Kush heritage. Earthy, citrusy, and slightly sweet with a powerful body high and mental relaxation. Award-winning, consistent, and deeply satisfying.

name: Blueberry
description: DJ Short's Blueberry is one of the most celebrated indicas ever created. The aroma is unmistakable — rich, sweet blueberry with floral undertones. A long-lasting body high and deeply calming euphoria. A true gem.

name: Strawberry Cough
description: Strawberry Cough is exactly what it sounds like — fresh strawberry sweetness that expands in the lungs. One of the most approachable sativas, delivering uplifting happiness, creative energy, and a social buzz without anxiety.

name: Trainwreck
description: Trainwreck hits fast and hard. This sativa-dominant hybrid delivers a rush of creative, euphoric energy that transitions into a smooth body relaxation. Pine, lemon, and spice on the palate. Good for experienced users who want a powerful ride.

name: Super Silver Haze
description: Three-time Cannabis Cup winner, Super Silver Haze is an old-school classic with serious credentials. Earthy and citrusy with a long-lasting cerebral high. Energizing, creative, and euphoric — the kind of sativa that launched careers in this industry.

name: Maui Wowie
description: Maui Wowie is Hawaiian sun in a strain. Sweet pineapple and tropical fruit flavors, light and airy with a euphoric, carefree energy. Great for outdoor activities, creative work, and anyone who wants a smooth, approachable daytime sativa.

name: Amnesia Haze
description: Amnesia Haze is a staple of Amsterdam coffeeshops for good reason. Powerful, long-lasting euphoria with a sharp, citrusy and earthy flavor. One of the most potent sativas available — not for the faint-hearted. The kind of high that demands your full attention.

name: Bruce Banner
description: Named after the Hulk's alter ego, Bruce Banner is one of the highest-THC strains available. Sweet diesel and strawberry aroma — Chemdawg lineage you can smell. A powerful euphoric onset that mellows into relaxed creativity. Incredibly potent.

name: Mimosa
description: Mimosa is the brunch of cannabis strains — bright citrus aroma, uplifting and social. Perfect morning or early afternoon choice that delivers clean energy and happiness without sedation. Sativa-dominant with a beautiful orange and tropical flavor profile.

name: Sunset Sherbet
description: Sunset Sherbet is a GSC descendant with an incredibly complex flavor — sweet berry, citrus, and creamy notes. Delivers full-body relaxation and mental euphoria without full sedation. Beautiful bag appeal and a truly satisfying experience.

name: Forbidden Fruit
description: Forbidden Fruit lives up to its name — the aroma is luscious tropical fruit and wild cherry. Deeply relaxing indica-dominant hybrid with a potent body high and calming euphoria. One of the most flavorful and visually stunning strains around.

name: Cherry Pie
description: Cherry Pie smells like fresh-baked cherry pastry — sweet, fruity, and slightly floral. A balanced hybrid that delivers euphoric happiness and gentle relaxation without heavy sedation. Consistent, reliable, and genuinely delicious.

name: Animal Cookies
description: Animal Cookies is a GSC descendant with pungent, sweet, and sour notes. High-THC with a heavy, full-body stone and lasting euphoria. Best reserved for evenings — this one takes hold and doesn't let go.

name: Clementine
description: Clementine is a citrus lover's dream. The aroma is sharp, sweet clementine orange — bright and instantly mood-lifting. Delivers a clean, focused sativa energy with creative uplifting effects. One of the most aromatic strains in the game.

name: Lemon Skunk
description: Lemon Skunk delivers exactly what it advertises — sharp lemon citrus with an earthy skunk backbone. Uplifting, cheerful, and sociable. A classic Amsterdam strain with award history and a flavor profile that's instantly recognizable.

name: LA Confidential
description: LA Confidential is a pure indica powerhouse with earthy, pine, and woody notes. Fast-acting and deeply sedating, with a smooth euphoria that fades into heavy sleep. A favorite for insomnia, chronic pain, and serious relaxation.

name: Banana Kush
description: Banana Kush smells exactly like ripe bananas — warm, sweet, and tropical. Delivers a laid-back, happy stone with gradual body relaxation and a case of the munchies. A perfect evening wind-down with one of the most unique and pleasant aromas around.

name: Fire OG
description: One of the strongest OG Kush phenotypes available. Fire OG is potent, pungent, and long-lasting. Lemon and earthy pine aroma with a heavy euphoria and deep body sedation. Demands experience — but rewards it deeply.

name: Cereal Milk
description: Cereal Milk smells like the leftover milk in a bowl of fruity cereal — sweet, creamy, and nostalgic. A balanced hybrid with euphoric happiness and gentle relaxation. Bag appeal is exceptional, flavor is unique, effects are smooth and pleasant.

name: MAC (Miracle Alien Cookies)
description: MAC is a collector's strain — perfectly balanced, visually stunning, and genuinely complex. Floral and diesel with citrus and herbal notes. Delivers a well-rounded euphoria and creative flow without heavy sedation. Highly sought after, and for good reason.

name: Slurricane
description: Slurricane is an indica-dominant powerhouse with rich grape and berry sweetness and a tropical finish. Heavy, sedating, and euphoric — it hits like the storm it's named after. Best saved for evenings when nowhere to be.

name: Death Star
description: The force of an indica hits hard with Death Star. Pungent diesel and skunk aroma with a sweet earthy finish. A slow-building, heavy stone that fully relaxes mind and body. An evening strain for seasoned smokers.

name: Grape Ape
description: Grape Ape delivers on its name — deep grape candy and berry aroma with purple-tinged buds. A slow-onset indica with a heavy, relaxing body high and peaceful euphoria. Perfect for stress relief and sleep.

name: Alien OG
description: Alien OG is a high-potency OG Kush phenotype with sharp lemon and pine. The high is intensely psychoactive — cerebral, reflective, and eventually deeply sedating. A serious strain for experienced consumers who want to go to another planet.

name: Lemon Haze
description: Lemon Haze is a bright, citrusy sativa with an energizing, creative high. Zesty lemon aroma and a smooth, cheerful buzz. Great for daytime use, social settings, and anyone who needs a mood lift without sedation.

name: Tropicana Cookies
description: Tropicana Cookies is a visually stunning strain with orange citrus and tropical sweetness. Sativa-leaning with a bright, uplifting euphoria and creative energy. GSC meets Tangie in one of the most flavorful hybrids available.

name: Acapulco Gold
description: A legendary Mexican landrace sativa with decades of history. Earthy and caramel-sweet with a powerful, long-lasting cerebral high. Acapulco Gold is a piece of cannabis history — and it still delivers an exceptional experience.

name: Platinum GSC
description: Platinum GSC is an elevated phenotype of Girl Scout Cookies — denser, more resinous, and even more potent. Sweet, pungent, and complex with a powerful euphoria that transitions into deep body relaxation. For the connoisseur who wants the very best of the GSC line.

name: Ghost Train Haze
description: Ghost Train Haze is among the most potent sativas ever tested. Sharp citrus and floral aroma, with a cerebral rush that can feel intense for newcomers. Laser-focused creativity and energy. Not for beginners — for those who want the full sativa experience.

name: Chocolope
description: Chocolope is a rare and distinctive sativa with a truly unique flavor — rich chocolate and coffee with vanilla and earth. Smooth, energizing, and euphorically uplifting. A great morning or creative-session strain with an aroma unlike anything else.

name: Critical Mass
description: Critical Mass is notable for its unusually high CBD content alongside strong THC. Sweet and earthy with a calming, deeply relaxing effect. Excellent for pain, anxiety, and sleep without the heavy psychoactive punch of other indicas.

name: Larry OG
description: Larry OG is a cleaner, more refined OG phenotype — lemon, pine, and earthy notes with a balanced head-to-body high. Euphoric onset transitions into smooth relaxation without heavy sedation. A well-rounded OG experience for any time of day.

name: Afghani
description: Afghani is one of the original landrace indicas — the genetic foundation of countless modern strains. Pure earthy and pungent with sweet undertones. Heavy body stone, deeply sedating, and deeply historic. This is where it all began.
